name: Ranryu
desc: You can only control 1 "Ranryu". If you control a Spellcaster monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). If this card is destroyed by battle or card effect and sent to the GY: You can target 1 monster with 1500 ATK/200 DEF in your GY, except "Ranryu"; Special Summon it.
mnst_eff: You can only control 1 "Ranryu". If you control a Spellcaster monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). If this card is destroyed by battle or card effect and sent to the GY: You can target 1 monster with 1500 ATK/200 DEF in your GY, except "Ranryu"; Special Summon it.
eff: You can only control 1 "Ranryu". If you control a Spellcaster monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). If this card is destroyed by battle or card effect and sent to the GY: You can target 1 monster with 1500 ATK/200 DEF in your GY, except "Ranryu"; Special Summon it.

sets.set: THE CHRONICLES DECK: Spirit Charmers (All-Foil Edition)

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
